channel.title: Green Bell Peppers Recipe on Great Chinese Food
channel.description: Recent content in Green Bell Peppers Recipe on Great Chinese Food

item.title: Egg and Pepper Soy Sauce Topping
item.description:
A versatile umami-packed sauce made from scrambled eggs and green peppers that transforms plain rice into a feast.

Ingredients

Ingredient Amount
eggs
green bell peppers
water 110克

Seasonings

  • scallion
  • white vinegar
  • dried chili peppers
  • yellow soybean paste
  • flour
  • sugar
  • MSG

Instructions

  1. 所有材料准备好：green bell peppers、dried chili peppers切碎，eggs里放入scallions花和white vinegar，放一点点salt，大概0.5克。 （dried chili peppers可以换成新鲜red bell peppers）yellow soybean paste上面那个是sugar，我懒得再用一个新碗了哈哈哈
  2. eggs用筷子滑散炒好盛出备用，多放点油炒出来比较嫩
  3. 锅里放油，flour倒进去翻炒（flour一定要放，小麦的麦香味放酱里超级提味）
  4. 炒到这种程度，放入青red bell peppers
  5. 炒到这种程度放入yellow soybean paste
  6. 翻炒一两分钟炒出酱香味
  7. 加入water和sugar，小火咕噜五六分钟
  8. 倒入eggs，放入MSG，再继续咕噜两三分钟
  9. 炒到这种程度就可以出锅啦，eggs酱放凉了更好吃，冰柜冷藏能放一个星期
  10. 天热的时候卷个小饼，小饼做法之前的菜谱里有
  11. 不想做饭的时候夹个大馒头

Tips

yellow soybean paste最好就用海天yellow soybean paste，其他的我试了一下感觉都太咸了

item.title: Green Pepper and Egg Noodle Salad
item.description:
Chewy noodles tossed with scrambled eggs and shredded green bell peppers in a savory soy-vinegar dressing for a satisfying 15-minute meal.

Ingredients

Ingredient Amount
eggs 2 piece
green bell peppers 1 piece

Seasonings

  • light soy sauce
  • dark soy sauce
  • oyster sauce
  • cornstarch
  • yellow soybean paste
  • vinegar
  • scallion, ginger, garlic

Instructions

  1. 先把酱汁调好，一定要放yellow soybean paste，这是灵魂。调好后可以加适量的water搅匀，也可以少放一点点salt。
  2. 先煮noodles，捞出后放入cold water。再炒eggs，炒chili peppers，倒入料汁，沸腾后倒入eggs，料汁变粘稠状即可盛出。
  3. 把green bell pepperseggs和noodles搅拌就做好啦！

Tips

For the best results, prepare all ingredients before you start cooking (mise en place).

item.title: Hot and Sour Shredded Potatoes
item.description:
Crisp shredded potatoes stir-fried with chili and vinegar for a tangy, spicy, never-boring classic.

Ingredients

Ingredient Amount
green bell peppers 少许

Seasonings

  • sugar
  • light soy sauce
  • oyster sauce
  • 油
  • garlic
  • vinegar
  • white vinegar

Instructions

  1. 备料：potatoes去皮 将2个potatoes洗净，削去外皮，切成大小一致的potatoes丝！
  2. 切好清洗potatoes丝 将去皮potatoes切成均匀细丝，放入water中反复冲洗，洗去表面cornstarch，避免炒制时黏连，保证口感脆爽。
  3. 焯water：加white vinegar增脆 锅中烧boiling water，放入potatoes丝，加入少许white vinegar，焯烫10-20秒后捞出，立刻过cold water并沥干water分，这是potatoes丝保持脆爽的关键。
  4. 爆香：garlic米与dried chili peppers 热锅倒入适量cooking oil，油热后放入garlic米和干红chili peppers段，小火煸炒出香味，注意火候避免炒糊。
  5. 调酸：加入aged black vinegar提香 往锅里加入适量aged black vinegar，salt，爆香，激发出浓郁vinegar香，奠定酸辣风味基础。
  6. 爆炒：放入potatoes丝 放入切好的青、红chili peppers丝，继续翻炒10秒，既丰富色泽，又增添脆爽口感。
  7. 出锅：装盘成品 加入少许sugar调味提鲜，翻炒均匀后立刻关火，盛出装盘，一盘色泽鲜亮、酸辣开胃的potatoes丝就完成了。

Tips

For the best results, prepare all ingredients before you start cooking (mise en place).

item.title: Restaurant-Style Braised Eggplant
item.description:
Extra-flavorful braised eggplant with tomatoes and green peppers in a rich sauce that rivals any restaurant.

Ingredients

Ingredient Amount
tomatoes
green bell peppers
eggs

Seasonings

  • garlic
  • light soy sauce
  • sugar
  • cornstarch
  • 耗油
  • salt
  • flour

Instructions

  1. Chinese eggplant切块，舀进两勺干cornstarch，用手拌匀。tomatoes、green bell peppers切块，garlic切片
  2. 调料汁：1勺cornstarch＋3勺water＋2勺soy sauce＋1勺耗油＋1勺sugar＋半勺salt
  3. 3小勺flour，3小勺cornstarch，一个eggs，适量water调成面糊。Chinese eggplant放进去滚一圈，每面都要粘上面糊
  4. 滚好后下油锅炸，炸到这样金黄色捞出。
  5. 锅留底油，下garlic瓣爆香后加tomatoes、green bell peppers大火炒
  6. 炒至断生后加入调好的料汁，煮开以后放Chinese eggplant
  7. 翻炒均匀就可以出锅了！

Tips

料汁的比例是我们家喜欢的口味，大家调出来后可以先尝一下，根据自己喜好加salt或sugar

item.title: Stir-Fried Beef with Green Peppers
item.description:
Thinly sliced beef wok-seared with green bell peppers in a black bean garlic sauce for a classic Chinese comfort dish.

Ingredients

Ingredient Amount
beef 300克
green bell peppers 6 piece

Seasonings

  • ginger
  • garlic
  • cornstarch
  • cooking wine
  • light soy sauce

Instructions

  1. gingergarlic切末，green bell peppers切丝，beef逆纹理切丝。beef放入一勺light soy sauce，半勺cooking wine，一勺cornstarch，一勺油抓匀腌制10分钟。
  2. 锅内倒少许油，油热后倒入beef丝，炒至变色后盛出。
  3. 锅内倒少许油，爆香gingergarlic，加入green bell peppers丝翻炒，倒一勺light soy sauce和少量salt翻炒，把刚炒好的beef丝倒在一起翻炒均匀即可出锅。

Tips

其实个人觉得这道菜chili peppers比肉放多点更好吃。

item.title: Stir-Fried Green Peppers with Scrambled Eggs
item.description:
A timeless Chinese comfort dish where tender green peppers meet fluffy scrambled eggs in a light soy glaze.

Ingredients

Ingredient Amount
green bell peppers 8 piece
eggs 4 piece

Seasonings

  • garlic
  • salt
  • sesame oil
  • cooking wine
  • light soy sauce

Instructions

  1. chili peppers一分为二，斜刀切 garlic切片 eggs打散加入少许salt跟sesame seedssesame oil、少许cooking wine搅匀
  2. 起锅烧油，倒入eggs液，用筷子快速搅碎 不要太熟，成型就可以出锅，装盘里待用
  3. 热锅放少许油，放入garlic跟青chili peppers翻炒，放少许salt翻炒均匀。待chili peppers炒至断生，倒入eggs翻炒均匀倒入light soy sauce调味即可

Tips

For the best results, prepare all ingredients before you start cooking (mise en place).
